summary: Tested all 3 fixes: attendance counting rework (sessions→days), seed bug fix, and new absence type toggle UI. All backend (7/7) and frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: attendance/routes.py PUT /attendance/types only saves 'types' field (not excluded_types). Excluded types are saved via PUT /api/settings. This is consistent but could be confusing — no action needed unless requirement changes.
Seed bug fix confirmed: seed.py $set no longer includes school_name, school_type, current_term, current_year. Onboarding values are preserved.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data. Seed test creates school TEST_School_Preserved to verify non-overwrite, seed runs and verifies preservation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes from this session verified working. Attendance now uses per-day counting (absent_days float, total_days int). Seed preserves onboarding settings. Imports tab has Absence Type Settings with green/grey toggles and Save Absence Settings button. Test credentials: admin@test.local / Admin1234.
